name: aMule
description: aMule is a free, open-source eD2k/Kad peer-to-peer file-sharing client with a headless daemon (amuled) and a built-in web interface (amuleweb).

notes.text: The web interface (amuleweb) and EC passwords are randomly generated MD5 hashes written to /opt/amule/data/.aMule/amule.conf during install.
Allow TCP and UDP traffic on port 4662 (eD2K), UDP 4672 (Kad), TCP 4711 (web UI) and TCP 4712 (EC) through your firewall.
aMule is built from source at install and update time; this requires the build toolchain and takes several minutes.
